plist.dict:
CFBundleDevelopmentRegion en CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundleDisplayName $(COSIGN_APP_DISPLAY_NAME) CFBundleName $(PRODUCT_NAME) CFBundlePackageType APPL #ifdef DEBUG CFBundleURLTypes
CFBundleURLName com.hackshare.cosign.deeplink CFBundleURLSchemes
$(COSIGN_DEV_URL_SCHEME)
#endif #ifdef COSIGN_DEMO CosignDemoModeProfile $(COSIGN_DEMO_MODE_PROFILE) #endif CosignRelayURL $(COSIGN_RELAY_URL) CosignEnvironment $(COSIGN_ENV) CFBundleShortVersionString $(MARKETING_VERSION) CFBundleVersion $(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION) LSRequiresIPhoneOS
UILaunchScreen
UISupportedInterfaceOrientations
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait
ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption
